info.title: quoll
info.description: Command line tool to DELETE files.

options.name: --name
options.description:
Filter by glob pattern file names. Multiple names can be
separated by comma. Default to *.

options.name: --folder
options.description:
Filter by glob pattern folder names. Multiple names can
be separated by comma. Default not to delete folders,
unless --remove-empty-dir specified.

options.name: --size
options.description:
Filter by file size(less than or equals), valid strings
are xxB, xxKB, xxMB, xxGB.

options.name: --backup
options.description: Save to backup location before deletion.

options.name: --from-file
options.description: File paths to delete. One file path per line.

options.name: --recursive
options.description: Include sub directories. Default to false.

arguments.name: dir
arguments.description: The target folder. Default to current folder.
